context: Empty directory. User wants a Roblox Luau project with Rojo for syncing to Studio. Linear MCP not configured.
expected_behavior: Step 2b Type selection goes to the secondary 'Other' question (Extension / CLI / Library / Roblox) per the command doc; user picks Roblox
Step 2c locks Language to Luau (Roblox is only Luau per the matrix)
Step 2e Tooling question offers Selene / StyLua / Rojo multiSelect (not Biome, Vitest, or other TypeScript tools)
Skips the TypeScript-only questions (libraries like Zod, testing like Vitest, infrastructure like Vercel)
Step 3 detects no Linear server and fires AskUserQuestion asking whether to continue without Linear; if yes, proceeds without Linear ticket creation
Step 6 scaffolds with `rojo init obby-game` (not pnpm create)
Step 8 writes .claude/bruhs.json with framework='Rojo', language='luau', tooling=['selene','stylua','rojo'], and omits the integrations.linear section
Step 10 writes a GitHub Actions workflow that uses selene and stylua (Luau tooling) — not pnpm
failure_modes: Offers TypeScript-specific options (Tailwind, shadcn, Vitest) on a Roblox project
Runs `pnpm create` instead of `rojo init` for scaffolding
Includes integrations.linear in the config with empty/null values instead of omitting it
